creator: shun.fbsd.pr@dropcut.net
text:
Created attachment 155383
adding CPE information to Makefile

devel/rubygem-gitlab_meta has had vulnerabilities with a CPE identifier assigned (e.g. CVE-2014-3456). This patch adds CPE information as suggested in the FreeBSD wiki[0].

[0] https://wiki.freebsd.org/Ports/CPE
